allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json for line in sys.stdin: line = line.strip\(\) if not line: continue try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\(''type'', ''''\) if role == ''user'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[USER] {c[""text""][:200]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[USER] {content[:200]}''\) elif role == ''assistant'': msg = obj.get\(''message'', {}\) content = msg.get\(''content'', ''''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\(''type''\) == ''text'': print\(f''[ASSISTANT] {c[""text""][:200]}''\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f''[ASSISTANT] {content[:200]}''\) except: pass ")
